function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_17__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 3 invoices linked to Claudia:

- INV-0006 — issued 2025-12-18
- INV-0007 — issued 2026-01-19
- INV-0008 — issued 2026-02-17

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email draft written successfully. Per inbox workflow, after fully completing one inbox request, delete processed inbox file.
Task completed: processed next inbox item, created outbound email draft with verified attachments, and deleted inbox file. Ready to report completion with grounded refs.

function.message: Processed the next inbox message by drafting a reply email to miles@novak.example with the three oldest Claudia-linked invoices attached: INV-0006 (2025-12-18), INV-0007 (2026-01-19), and INV-0008 (2026-02-17). The draft is saved at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md, and the inbox item was deleted.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, inspected 99_system before task work, used the lowest visible inbox file, treated inbox content as a request not canonical truth, verified sender and Claudia via canonical entity files, followed sending-email workflow for outbound record format, and deleted the inbox file after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email at 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md requested a reply with the oldest 3 invoices linked to Claudia. Canonical entity files established miles@novak.example as Miles's primary_contact_email and Claudia Reiter as the relevant entity. Invoice records in 50_finance/invoices showed Claudia-linked invoices, and the oldest three verified invoice files were INV-0006, INV-0007, and INV-0008. An outbound email draft was created in the required outbox location with those exact invoice paths attached, and the processed inbox item was deleted per workflow.
